title: Historical Bounded Validation-Surface Decomposition Planning
historical_note: This packet records one bounded Olares Phase 5 validation-surface decomposition planning slice from before the canonical repo boundary moved to `C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform` on 2026-05-07. It remains packet-history provenance, not a live execution instruction for current repo operations.
current_routing: use PROJECT_STATUS.md for the current residue-retirement lane and latest completed packets
use docs/architecture/OLARES-PUBLICATION-BOUNDARY-RETIREMENT-DEPENDENCY-INVENTORY-2026-05-06.md for the remaining post-cutover boundary closeout queue
use this packet JSON only when historical provenance is needed for the earlier `olares-phase-5-073` validation-surface decomposition planning slice
objective: Define the exact one-worker validation/test-surface decomposition slice needed to split the shared operations-web browser-smoke file into disjoint tracked validation files, without executing source/test work or approving simultaneous multi-worker execution.
planned_execution_packet: Olares Phase 5 075 - Bounded One-Worker Validation-Surface Decomposition Execution
required_pre_execution_packet: Olares Phase 5 074 - Packet 071 Through Packet 073 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate

required_shape: Delete or retire the shared `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts` file so apparatus and relay coverage no longer converge on a single tracked file.
Move unrelated re-homed static browser-surface heading coverage into `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.static-surfaces.smoke.spec.ts`.
Do not change application source, package files, lockfiles, runtime configuration, service configuration, or Playwright configuration.

future_ownership_model: A future apparatus worker may own only apparatus application source plus `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.apparatus.smoke.spec.ts`.
A future relay worker may own only relay application source plus `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.relay.smoke.spec.ts`.
No simultaneous workers may open until a later post-publication readiness verdict confirms the decomposed files are tracked, validated, published, and reconciled cleanly.
validation_requirements: Host execution may run only no-install checks available on `/home/olares/code/apex`; if host executable validation is blocked by missing dependencies, record the blocker and preserve the artifact.
Workstation mirror validation must confirm the exact decomposition diff and run `git diff --check`.

Workstation executable validation should run the existing no-install app-local checks available for the operations-web app, including `tsc --noEmit`, `next build`, and focused Playwright tests for the three decomposed spec files if available without installs.
Any validation blocker must be recorded without widening scope.
sql_permission_note: This planning packet authorizes no database writes and no source edits, source/test execution, validation-surface decomposition execution, simultaneous multi-worker mutation, migration approval, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, second-worker execution, slice widening beyond the named test-only paths, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05. Packet 073 defines a future one-worker, test-only decomposition slice that may replace the shared `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts` with apparatus, relay, and static-surfaces browser-smoke spec files after Packet 074 publishes Packet 071 through Packet 073 authority. No source/test execution, simultaneous multi-worker mutation, migration, package/lockfile mutation, install, runtime/service mutation, remote rewrite, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation opens.
